headline: Hospitality is connected in theory
angle: Hububb Main - Post 2: hospitality is connected in theory, fragmented in reality. Hosts juggle too many tools, guests expect high standards, cleaners and maintenance are coordinated by hand, and operations live across chats, calendars, and spreadsheets. Hububb is building the connected layer beneath it all.

headline: Guest messages answered by AI
angle: A short video showing guest messages being answered on their own, in the host's voice, so the whole exchange resolves itself and leaves a warm feeling of reassurance. Dark scene, light phone.

headline: Guest messages answered by AI
angle: A short video showing guest messages being answered on their own, in the host's voice, so the whole exchange resolves itself and leaves a warm feeling of reassurance.

headline: The inbox that answers itself
angle: Guests message at every hour. The host should not have to be the one awake for it. Hostie answers in his voice, day and night.

headline: Guests never wait for you to wake up
angle: Guests message at every hour. The host should not have to be the one awake for it. Hostie answers in his voice, day and night.

headline: Both flats stop living in your head
angle: Guests message at every hour. The host should not have to be the one awake for it. Hostie answers in his voice, day and night.

headline: The invisible layer
angle: Post 3 of the @wearehububb launch, as a carousel: the invisible layer resolves into three forms. A cover, then a full-bleed slide for each product, Host, Stay, and Work.

headline: Behind every
angle: Post 2 of the @wearehububb launch, the more visual variant: a full-bleed managed-stay interior with the tension-to-promise line overlaid. Staying should feel like ease; right now it asks too much, so we're building the layer beneath it all.

headline: Effort is everywhere.
angle: Post 2 of the @wearehububb launch, light variant: the tension. Staying somewhere asks for far too much today, effort is everywhere and ease is nowhere, so we're building the layer that changes that.

headline: Your autonomous AI host
angle: Hostie is the autonomous AI host that runs the whole property while you watch.

headline: Your autonomous AI host
angle: Hostie is the autonomous AI host that runs the whole property while you watch.

headline: The busywork runs itself now.
angle: The average host loses hours a week to repetitive busywork. Hububb hands those hours back.

headline: Answered before you woke up.
angle: A host's phone lights up at 2 AM with a guest question, and it's already been answered. The stress of always-on availability, dissolved.

headline: Answers in seconds, in your voice
angle: Guests get fast, accurate replies day and night, in the host's voice, and cannot tell the host was asleep. AI guest messaging handles the routine and hands over what needs a human.

headline: Double bookings end here
angle: When calendars do not talk to each other, a double booking is only a matter of time. Channel sync keeps availability right everywhere at once.

headline: The cleaner is booked before you wake up
angle: A booking comes in, the turnover schedules itself, a vetted cleaner is assigned, the host does nothing. Cleaning and turnovers are handled end to end.

headline: Your own booking site, no cut taken
angle: Send a guest straight to you instead of through a platform that takes a cut. A direct booking site connected to the same synced calendar.

headline: Stop guessing what tonight is worth
angle: Pricing by gut feeling leaves money on the table or leaves the unit empty. Dynamic pricing adjusts rates to demand automatically.

headline: Everything a guest needs, before they ask
angle: Access codes, wifi, check-in steps and local tips in one place the guest can open any time. Fewer questions for the host, a smoother arrival for the guest.

headline: It is 1am and a guest needs the wifi password
angle: Guests message at every hour. The host should not have to be the one awake for it. AI guest messaging answers routine questions around the clock, in the host's voice.

headline: An empty night never comes back
angle: An empty night is lost income you never get back. Hububb keeps the calendar working so units do not sit idle.

headline: One slow reply can cost you a star
angle: A slow reply or a confusing check-in quietly costs a star. Hububb keeps every stay consistent so the experience holds up whether the host is watching or not.

headline: The rules change. Your operation should not scramble
angle: Short-let caps and changing rules add another thing to track. Hububb keeps the operation organised so the host stays on top of it without the spreadsheet.

headline: Hosting was meant to be the side thing
angle: Hosting was supposed to be the side thing, then it took over the evenings. Hububb takes the repetitive operational work off the host's plate.

headline: Every guest, every channel, one inbox
angle: Airbnb in one place, Booking in another, a direct guest somewhere else. The unified inbox pulls every conversation into one place so nothing slips.
